questions.question: Which of the following rivers is NOT a major river of the Great Plateau (Peninsular Plateau) of India?
Which of the following rivers flows through Rajasthan?
Which of the following rivers originates in the Western Ghats?
Through which of the following plateaus does the River Damodar flow?
The Narmada River originates from which hills?
Which of the following is the largest Peninsular river?
Which river system is known for forming gorges in the Himalayan region?
Which of the following is a tributary of the Yamuna river?
Which of the following physical factors influences the compactness of rural settlements in dry regions like Rajasthan?
Which factor primarily contributed to the development of nucleated settlements in the Bundelkhand region of central India?
Desert soil is mostly found in which Indian state?
What is the dominant soil type in the Great Plains of India?
Which of the following soils has the highest water-retaining capacity?
Saline and Alkaline soils are most commonly found in:
questions.option_1: the Deltas of Ganga and Godavari

questions.question: Which soil is deficient in nitrogen and phosphorus but rich in iron and aluminium?
Alluvial soil is mainly found in which region of India?
Nilgiri Biosphere Reserve spans which of the following groups of Indian states?
Where is the Indian naval air station INS Baaz located?
What type of shrine is the Neeramankara Temple located in Nemam, Kerala, in India known to be?
Most of the Thar Desert lies in which direction with respect to the Aravalli Hills?
Most of the Thar desert lies within India, spanning the states of _________.
questions.option_1: Rajasthan, Gujarat, Punjab, and Madhya Pradesh
questions.option_2: Rajasthan, Gujarat, Punjab, and Uttar Pradesh
questions.option_3: Rajasthan, Gujarat, Punjab, and Himachal Pradesh

questions.question: Which of the following states is famous for its ingenious water conservation methods, 'taanka' or 'kunds'?
Which transport system is most efficient in terms of energy consumption per tonne-km in India?
Which of the following agricultural practices is called Ponam in Kerala and Podu in Odisha?
Which Indian state has the largest number of tribal communities classified under Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs) as of December 2022?
